Who I am

I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer and ML Engineer with expertise in building modern web applications and machine learning solutions.

I specialize in developing full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js, while also exploring the frontiers of machine learning and artificial intelligence.
